posts.author: Marcel_Bisschop (Marcel Bisschop)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hello,

We got a request from a customer to have the ability to export a Monday doc (to PDF), without showing the metadata (creator, creation date, update date information).

They share their docs with external parties, and would like to export the doc as clean as possible.

Kind regards,

Marcel

What are you trying to achieve

Export docs without showing metadata (creator, creation date, update date information).
